name: Medical Necessity Second Opinion
description: Call this tool when a claim's medical necessity assessment is ambiguous or uncertain. Specifically use this tool when: (1) the claim_description narrative is insufficient or ambiguous   to clearly assess medical necessity, (2) the claim_amount is unusually high relative to the claim_type and coverage_type, or (3) you've already determined disposition is REVIEW but  want a second opinion to validate or challenge your reasoning before finalizing. Send the relevant claim details and your initial assessment, and Claude will provide an independent  medical-necessity perspective. Do NOT call this tool for routine claims with clear narrative-coverage alignment or for claims that obviously fall under policy exclusions or fail rule  1 (intake quality).
